title: WHAT A YEAR IT HAS BEEN
author: Kevin
message:
👏👏👏ROUND OF APPLAUSE👏👏👏 And just like this my first year came to an end, I am already feeling my joints deteriorating. Gladly, I got to spend my youthful year surrounded by amazing people at amazing places. AND THAT'S THANKS TO YOU GUYS. Without your support, my grades would have been a lot lower (and I wouldn't have met this goober). Not only did you make this transition bearable, but also memorable. Whatever you will pursue next year, I wish you best of luck, and just you remember that you made this fella very happy
do I get 50 points for this?
